text: Now let me synthesize the analysis.

function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "commit", "action_id": "suppress", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": -0.5, "adjustment_reasons": ["E0 classification indicates benign/equipment malfunction", "Raw data shows 'background:true' suggesting routine robot motion", "Hand-set prior (n=0) is weak — free to adjust based on evidence level"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.05, "what_would_change_my_mind": "A subsequent event with higher severity or human presence confirmation; a guard report that the robot was in a restricted zone or behaving erratically."}
